medical.headline: Medical benefit → Buy & Bill via specialty distributor
medical.summary: Order NEXPLANON from a specialty distributor, hold inventory in the office, and bill the patient's insurance for the drug (J7307) and the procedure (CPT 11981 / 11982 / 11983) together.
nextActions: Confirm your distributor account is active and the prescriber is REMS-certified (required to place orders beginning 8/23/2026).
Verify the patient's medical benefit covers J7307 and the applicable CPT code (11981 / 11982 / 11983).
Schedule the patient for the in-office insertion or removal visit.
Submit the claim with J7307 and the CPT code on separate service lines, place of service 11.

pharmacy.headline: Pharmacy benefit → AOB via specialty pharmacy
pharmacy.summary: A specialty pharmacy bills the patient's plan for the drug and ships patient-specific NEXPLANON to your office. Your office bills only for the insertion or removal procedure (CPT 11981 / 11982 / 11983).
pharmacy.codesNote: On the AOB pathway, the specialty pharmacy bills the patient's plan for the drug (J7307 / NDC). Your office bills only the insertion or removal procedure (CPT).
nextActions: Submit enrollment by e-Prescribe in your EMR or by faxing the NEXPLANON Enrollment Form (fax 844-232-2618).
Confirm the patient has responded to the specialty pharmacy's text-authorization request.
Confirm receipt of the patient-specific shipment before scheduling the procedure.
Bill the procedure only (CPT 11981 / 11982 / 11983) — do not bill J7307 on the AOB pathway.
